description: Returns mission end type and how it was ended or an empty array [] is mission was not ended.
name: missionEnd

ArraySized.desc: the ending that was passed to [[failMission]] or [[endMission]]
ArraySized.name: endType

ArraySized.desc: [[true]] if the mission ended via [[failMission]], [[false]] if via [[endMission]]
ArraySized.name: failMission

ArraySized.desc: engine idea of how mission ended. For example if mission ended via [[failMission]] but the type of ending was not "Killed", ''isFailed'' is [[false]]
ArraySized.name: isFailed
